pull_request.title: feat: Remove the MS C++ unit test project
pull_request.body: The unit test project bases on the Microsoft Visual Studio C++ unit test framework has been replaced with a new project based on the Google unit test framework. This project is thus no longer needed and can be removed.

changed_files.patch:

@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@
 # SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
 
 version: 2.1.1.{build}
+skip_branch_with_pr: true
 os: Visual Studio 2019
 configuration:
 - Debug

@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ jobs:
       runInParallel: true
       resultsFolder: '$(build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/Test/Results'
       codeCoverageEnabled: true
-      runSettingsFile: 'unittest\CodeCoverage.runsettings'
+      runSettingsFile: 'tests\CodeCoverage.runsettings'
 
 - job: 'cppVS2026'
   pool:

@@ -13,12 +13,12 @@ sonar.sourceEncoding = UTF-8
 
 # Define the source code to scan (only scan files that are part of the CharLS library)
 sonar.sources = src/,include/
-sonar.tests = test/,unittest/,benchmark/,fuzzing/
+sonar.tests = test/,tests/,benchmark/,fuzzing/
 
 # Duplication exclusions
 # SonarQube reports often false warnings for template classes., exclude these files.
 sonar.cpd.exclusions = src/scan_decoder_impl.h,src/scan_encoder_impl.h
 
 # File exclusions
 sonar.exclusions=**/*.jls,**/*.pgm
-sonar.cfamily.exclusions=**/*.jls,**/*.pgm
\ No newline at end of file
+sonar.cfamily.exclusions=**/*.jls,**/*.pgm

@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ banny
 BINDIR
 bugprone
 CETCOMPAT
+cfamily
 charls
 charlstest
 cmove
@@ -28,6 +29,7 @@ mrfx
 NOEXCEPT
 opto
 palletised
+Qube
 rect
 simd
 STREQUAL

-    __pragma(warning(push)) __pragma(warning(disable : x)) // NOLINT(misc-macro-parentheses, bugprone-macro-parentheses)
-#define MSVC_WARNING_UNSUPPRESS() __pragma(warning(pop))
-#define MSVC_WARNING_SUPPRESS_NEXT_LINE(x) \
-    __pragma(warning(suppress \
-                     : x)) // NOLINT(misc-macro-parentheses, bugprone-macro-parentheses, cppcoreguidelines-macro-usage)
-#else

-#define MSVC_WARNING_UNSUPPRESS()
-#define MSVC_WARNING_SUPPRESS_NEXT_LINE(x)
-#endif

commit_summaries.message:
feat: Remove the MS C++ unit test project

The unit test project bases on the Microsoft Visual Studio C++ unit test framework has been replaced with a new project based on the Google unit test framework.
This project is thus no longer needed and can be removed.
Prevent 2 builds for an open PR
